v8.0.11 moves the remaining per-language enum declarations, Go FFI size
expectations, and layout drift-detector values under the TOML-driven
generator path. No compatibility shims were added. `tdbe` remains at
`0.12.0`.

See the [v8.0.11 entry in the structured changelog](https://github.com/userFRM/ThetaDataDx/blob/v8.0.11/CHANGELOG.md#8011---2026-04-23) for the full detail.

## Added

- `endpoint_surface.toml` enum declarations for `Right`, `Venue`,
  `Interval`, `RateType`, `RequestType`, and `Version`.
- Generated Rust, Python, TypeScript, Go, and C++ enum / layout artifacts
  sourced from the TOML specs.
- Generated Go FFI size and offset drift-detector files:
  `endpoint_ffi_sizes_generated.go`,
  `tick_ffi_sizes_generated.go`,
  `fpss_ffi_sizes_generated.go`,
  `ffi_layout_generated_test.go`, and
  `fpss_ffi_offset_checks_generated.go`.

## Changed

- `crates/tdbe/src/types/enums.rs` now includes the generator-owned
  endpoint-surface enums.
- `sdks/python/src/coerce.rs` now includes the generator-owned enum
  pyclasses.
- `sdks/cpp/include/thetadx.hpp` now includes generated tick and FPSS
  layout assertion fragments.
- `sdks/go/tick_ffi_mirrors.go` now consumes generated size constants and
  generated FPSS offset checks. The old handwritten `ffi_layout_test.go`
  has been replaced by generated Go tick layout tests.
- Live docs no longer hardcode endpoint, tick, or tool counts.
- Release metadata bumps to `8.0.11` across the Rust crates, Python
  package, TypeScript package set, loader guard, and OpenAPI spec.

## Verification

- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --features "polars,arrow" -- -D warnings`
- `cargo clippy --manifest-path sdks/python/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo clippy --manifest-path sdks/typescript/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo clippy --manifest-path tools/mcp/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo clippy --manifest-path tools/server/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast`
- `cargo doc --workspace --no-deps --all-features`
- `scripts/regen_byte_identical.sh`
- `scripts/check_docs_consistency.py`
- `scripts/check_tier_badges.py`
- `cargo deny check`
- `(cd docs-site && npm run build)`
- `PYO3_PYTHON=/usr/bin/python3 cargo test --manifest-path sdks/python/Cargo.toml --lib`
- `cargo build --release -p thetadatadx-ffi && (cd sdks/go && go build ./... && go test ./...)`
